identity.name: AI Access — AWS Access Key Leaked to Anthropic API
identity.summary: A user pastes an AKIA-prefixed AWS access key into a prompt sent to Anthropic's API. Cortex AI Access classifies the outbound HTTPS as generative-AI, fires a DLP credential-pattern match on the request body, and the block-action policy denies subsequent sessions from the offending user context. Validates the credential-leak EAL on a non-sanctioned-user codepath.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-002. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1552. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIACC-002.
UC: Cloud Credential Disclosure to External LLM / TC: AWS Access Key in Prompt Body to api.anthropic.com.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm secret payload contains the canary AKIA key
python3 -c "
from core.eal_simulator.plugins.llm_provider_egress import _render_payload
assert 'AKIA0000CORTEXSIMCANARY' in _render_payload('secret')
print('canary marker present in secret payload')
" || echo "[CortexSim] payload self-check (best-effort)"
# step-2: Single secret POST to api.anthropic.com via EAL plugin
cat > /tmp/aiacc-002.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-002
name: "AI Access — AWS key leak to Anthropic"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.anthropic.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, anthropic, secret-dlp]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: anthropic
      payload_type: secret
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-002.yml --live
# step-3: Verify per-session block-action policy (4 attempts)
cat > /tmp/aiacc-002-burst.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-002
name: "AI Access — secret burst"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.anthropic.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: anthropic
      payload_type: secret
      iterations: 4
      sleep_seconds: 3
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-002-burst.yml --live
